name: Blackfeather Darkrage Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>玄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ブラック・フェザー
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn, when you take damage: You can send up to 5 cards from the top of your Deck to the Graveyard, then if any monsters were sent to the Graveyard by this effect, this card gains 400 ATK.

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Activates if you take effect damage
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
